name: Demo Content Packs
description: Markdown content packs for import fidelity and narrative system validation.

contentPacks.name: Girl by Moonlight (Flagship Demo)
contentPacks.description: Full pre-1.0 narrative system validation: party, orgs, quests, threads, havens, projects, knowledge, and cross-system relationships.
contentPacks.author: Esiana Team

contentPacks.name: Daggerheart Demo
contentPacks.description: Character metadata, organizations, relationships, and adventure quests.
contentPacks.author: Esiana Team

contentPacks.name: Starfinder Demo
contentPacks.description: Maps, locations, travel hooks, organizations, and map pin import validation.
contentPacks.author: Esiana Team

contentPacks.name: Tomb of Horrors (Demo Adventure Pack)
contentPacks.description: Import fidelity: wiki links, skeleton coverage, calendar — not a feature showcase.
contentPacks.author: Esiana Team

contentPacks.name: Player Experience Demo
contentPacks.description: Visibility, DM-only content, session notes, and knowledge boundaries.
contentPacks.author: Esiana Team
